description: Find a window by title or handle. Returns: 'found window: {title} (hwnd={id}, class={class}, rect={w}x{h}+{x}+{y})'. Note: apps minimized to the system tray may have empty titles and won't be found by this tool — use execute_command with Get-Process to check if the app is running, then click its tray icon. Example: {"title": "Notepad"}
name: find_window
